data.content: Requested changes after implementation review of branch fix/setup-hide-mounted-repos at commit 34333c71514ea7158eb85c79a485de393303fe5b. The implementation correctly filters mounted repositories out of subsequent scans and the artifact passed `bash scripts/test-setup-scan-unmounted.sh`, `bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/app-update.test.ts`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run lint`, and `bun run build` in an isolated checkout. However, acceptance criterion 2 specifically requires the UI message to display 'Found N unmounted repositories'. The implementation currently emits 'Found unmounted repositories:' with no count, and the new test only asserts that the header contains the word 'unmounted', so the required exact behavior is still missing and unverified.
